steps.title: Keep the order of the fraction
steps.content: The numerator stays $16$ and the input $17$ goes in the denominator. The value is $\frac{16}{17}$, not its reciprocal.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is $\frac{16}{17}$, so it is correct. Choice B reverses the fraction, choice C is the numerator only, and choice D is the input value only.
